title: The Frequency of Truth
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a man is found dead inside a locked radio room with a cryptic sequence of numbers scrawled on the wall, Detective Sarah Chen recognizes the markings from her past life as a signals intelligence analyst.
long_description: Port Ferris, a fog-shrouded coastal city in the Pacific Northwest, becomes the hunting ground for a killer who communicates through ghost frequencies from the Cold War. Detective Sarah Chen, haunted by an operation she monitored years ago as a SIGINT analyst, partners with reclusive cryptographer Marcus Webb to decode a deadly countdown. The numbers stations are broadcasting kill orders, and each transmission brings the killer closer to completing a mission thirty years in the making. As more bodies surface and the conspiracy reaches into Chen's own department, she realizes the final transmission may be aimed at her.
